name: Bodacious Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 large sweet red pepper; coarsely chopped
1/2 cup Burgundy or other dry red wine
2 cans kidney beans; drained (16 oz each)
1 can chickpeas (garbanzo beans); drained (16 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook first 8 ingredients in olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat, stirring constantly until meat browns.
2. Drain and return meat mixture to the Dutch oven. Stir in cocoa powder and remaining ingredients.
3. Bring mixture to a boil; reduce heat and simmer for 1-1/2 hours, stirring occasionally.
4. Serve with Spicy Sour Cream Topping and shredded cheddar cheese.
SPICY SOUR CREAM TOPPING: Combine all ingredients; chill. Serve with chili. Yield 1-2/3 cups.
